# Upstream-generated GGUF regression

`gguf-py-0.17.1.gguf` is generated by the upstream `gguf-py==0.17.1`
`GGUFWriter`, rather than AgentHound's synthetic Go writers. It provides an
independent check of the literal `GGUF` signature, metadata layout, tensor
shape, F32 tensor type, tokenizer inventory, and values consumed by the
production parser.

Regenerate in an isolated environment with:

```bash
python -m pip install 'gguf==0.17.1' 'numpy>=1.17'
python testdata/extract/gen_upstream_fixture.py
shasum -a 256 testdata/extract/gguf-py-0.17.1.gguf
```

Reviewed SHA-256: `53d7aa99b07c460e6d9785173c45ae65bd38ae0180d61d66e586bfb4549b5e12`
